scripts.build:mac:x64: npm run build -- --mac dmg --x64 && npm run rename:mac:x64
scripts.build:mac:both: npm run build -- --mac dmg --x64 --arm64 && npm run rename:mac:x64
scripts.rename:mac:x64: if [ -f "dist/MIDI Editors-$npm_package_version.dmg" ]; then mv "dist/MIDI Editors-$npm_package_version.dmg" "dist/MIDI Editors-$npm_package_version-x64.dmg"; fi
